functions.tag: {EntityTag:{Invisible:1b,Invulnerable:1b,NoGravity:1b,Tags:["SignStand","PermanentStand","FurnaceTrader","TypeChecked"]},Repaircost:1000000000,display:{Lore:['{"text":"ｲﾝﾍﾞﾝﾄﾘｰ内に下記で要求されたｱｲﾃﾑがあった場合、","color":"yellow","italic":false}','{"text":"それと引き換えにｱｲﾃﾑを入手する事が出来る印板。","color":"yellow","italic":false}','{"text":"取引内容：丸石64個をｶﾏﾄﾞ8個と交換する。","color":"green","italic":false}'],Name:'[{"text":"取引","color":"green","bold":true,"italic":false},{"text":"の印判","color":"white","bold":true,"italic":false},{"text":"(","color":"white","bold":true,"italic":false},{"text":"丸石","color":"gray","bold":true,"italic":false},{"text":" → ","color":"white","bold":true,"italic":false},{"text":"かまど","color":"dark_gray","bold":true, "italic":false},{"text":")","color":"white","bold":true,"italic":false}]'}}
